# Security Policy

This repository contains the static marketing site for SudoSodoku
(<https://sudosodokuapp.github.io>). It is plain HTML/CSS served by GitHub
Pages: no server code, no user accounts, no data collection.

For vulnerabilities in the **SudoSodoku iOS app**, please use the app
repository's [security policy](https://github.com/SudoSodokuApp/SudoSodoku/security/policy)
instead.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Please do NOT report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.**

If you find a security issue in this site — for example content injection,
a compromised link, or anything that could mislead visitors — report it via:

1. **GitHub Security Advisory**: [private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/SudoSodokuApp/SudoSodokuApp.github.io/security/advisories/new) (recommended)
2. **Direct contact**: message the maintainer through GitHub

Please include a description of the issue, its potential impact, and steps
to reproduce. You can expect an initial response within a week.

Thank you for helping keep SudoSodoku users safe! 🔒
